content_body:
Yoga Over Blue Ridge is a unique yoga studio in the North Georgia Mountains and offers a variety of fun events. The studio offers a fun and safe space for your practice, as well as a hip yogi boutique, and the Zen & Juice Juice Bar you won’t be able to resist. They are famous for our destination yoga events and private yoga parties.

Get strong and get flexible- not only in your body but also in your mind and spirit. Most importantly, have some fun!
title: Yoga Over Blue Ridge
